title: Gift Cards API
description: The Gift Cards API enables merchants to create, manage, and track gift cards. Gift cards can be of two types: FUND (monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT (usage-based). The API supports creating gift cards, retrieving gift card information, and tracking transactions.

apis.heading: Create Gift Card
apis.description: Creates a new gift card with specified type and configuration. Gift cards can be FUND type (with monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT type (with usage limits).

reqParams.name: cardType
reqParams.description: Type of gift card to create.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Monetary amount for FUND type gift cards. Required when cardType is FUND.

reqParams.name: redemptionLimit
reqParams.description: Number of times the gift card can be used. Required when cardType is ENTITLEMENT.

reqParams.name: currency
reqParams.description: Currency code for the gift card amount.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Optional name for the gift card.

reqParams.name: accessControl
reqParams.description: Access control level for the gift card.

possibleValues.description: Gift card can be used by anyone

reqParams.name: expiryDate
reqParams.description: Expiry date for the gift card in mm/dd/yyyy or mm-dd-yyyy format.

reqParams.name: note
reqParams.description: Optional note or description for the gift card.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing gift card details.

resParams.name: giftCardId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the created gift card.

resParams.name: pan
resParams.description: Primary Account Number for the gift card.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the gift card.

resParams.name: formats
resParams.description: Different format representations of the gift card.

resParams.name: qrCode
resParams.description: QR code representation of the gift card.

resParams.name: nfcData
resParams.description: NFC data for the gift card.

resParams.name: barcode
resParams.description: Barcode representation of the gift card.

resParams.name: cardType
resParams.description: Type of the gift card (FUND or ENTITLEMENT).

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Monetary amount for FUND type gift cards.

resParams.name: redemptionLimit
resParams.description: Usage limit for ENTITLEMENT type gift cards.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Currency code for the gift card.

resParams.name: accessControl
resParams.description: Access control level of the gift card.

resParams.name: externalId
resParams.description: External identifier for the gift card.

resParams.name: externalIdType
resParams.description: Type of external identifier.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the gift card.

resParams.name: shareableLink
resParams.description: Shareable link for the gift card.

resParams.name: expiryDate
resParams.description: Expiry date of the gift card.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Get All Gift Cards
apis.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all gift cards for a merchant. Supports filtering by type and status.
apis.query: To filter gift cards send in type and status as query params. Use x-page-number header for pagination.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of gift card objects.

resParams.name: giftCardId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the gift card.

resParams.name: pan
resParams.description: Primary Account Number for the gift card.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the gift card.

resParams.name: cardType
resParams.description: Type of the gift card (FUND or ENTITLEMENT).

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Original monetary amount for FUND type gift cards.

resParams.name: currentAmount
resParams.description: Current remaining amount for FUND type gift cards.

resParams.name: usageCount
resParams.description: Number of times the gift card has been used.

resParams.name: redemptionLimit
resParams.description: Usage limit for ENTITLEMENT type gift cards.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Currency code for the gift card.

resParams.name: accessControl
resParams.description: Access control level of the gift card.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the gift card.

resParams.name: expiryDate
resParams.description: Expiry date of the gift card.

resParams.name: lastTransactionAt
resParams.description: Timestamp of the last transaction.

resParams.name: transactionCount
resParams.description: Total number of transactions.

resParams.name: totalRedeemed
resParams.description: Total amount redeemed from the gift card.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Get Gift Card Details
apis.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific gift card using its ID or PAN. Includes customer details, transaction history summary, and format representations.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Detailed gift card information.

resParams.name: giftCardId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the gift card.

resParams.name: pan
resParams.description: Primary Account Number for the gift card.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the gift card.

resParams.name: cardType
resParams.description: Type of the gift card (FUND or ENTITLEMENT).

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Original monetary amount for FUND type gift cards.

resParams.name: currentAmount
resParams.description: Current remaining amount for FUND type gift cards.

resParams.name: usageCount
resParams.description: Number of times the gift card has been used.

resParams.name: redemptionLimit
resParams.description: Usage limit for ENTITLEMENT type gift cards.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Currency code for the gift card.

resParams.name: accessControl
resParams.description: Access control level of the gift card.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the gift card.

resParams.name: expiryDate
resParams.description: Expiry date of the gift card.

resParams.name: lastTransactionAt
resParams.description: Timestamp of the last transaction.

resParams.name: transactionCount
resParams.description: Total number of transactions.

resParams.name: totalRedeemed
resParams.description: Total amount redeemed from the gift card.

resParams.name: customerDetails
resParams.description: Customer information associated with the gift card.

resParams.name: customerId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the customer.

resParams.name: firstName
resParams.description: Customer's first name.

resParams.name: middleName
resParams.description: Customer's middle name.

resParams.name: surname
resParams.description: Customer's surname.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Customer's country code.

resParams.name: emails
resParams.description: Array of customer email addresses.

resParams.name: email
resParams.description: Customer email address.

resParams.name: phoneNumbers
resParams.description: Array of customer phone numbers.

resParams.name: phoneNumber
resParams.description: Customer phone number details.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Phone number country code.

resParams.name: number
resParams.description: Phone number.

resParams.name: shareableLink
resParams.description: Shareable link for the gift card.

resParams.name: formats
resParams.description: Different format representations of the gift card.

resParams.name: qrCode
resParams.description: QR code representation of the gift card.

resParams.name: nfcData
resParams.description: NFC data for the gift card.

resParams.name: barcode
resParams.description: Barcode representation of the gift card.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Get Gift Card Transactions
apis.description: Retrieves a paginated list of transactions for a specific gift card. Supports filtering by transaction type.
apis.query: To filter transactions by type send in transactionType as query param. Use x-page-number header for pagination.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of transaction objects.

resParams.name: paymentId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the payment/transaction.

resParams.name: transactionType
resParams.description: Type of transaction (ISSUED, CREDIT, DEBIT).

resParams.name: transactionAmount
resParams.description: Amount involved in the transaction.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Currency code for the transaction amount.

resParams.name: valueBefore
resParams.description: Gift card value before the transaction.

resParams.name: valueAfter
resParams.description: Gift card value after the transaction.

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Associated order ID if applicable.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Merchant ID associated with the transaction.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: Store ID associated with the transaction.

resParams.name: metadata
resParams.description: Additional metadata for the transaction.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
